name: Salsa De Suegra (Mother-in-law Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Roughly chop the tomatoes.
2. Add a little at a time with the rest of the ingredients to a blender jar.
3. Blend for a few seconds with each addition until the sauce has a rough consistency.
4. The key to salsa verde is the tomatillos (tomate verde -- NOT just a green tomato). If you don't have them, they are available canned in the Mexican food section.
